importantNote: This file documents the intended GoHighLevel stack. Store the Private Integration Token in GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN; do not commit the real token.

requiredPhotos: one wide photo of each room
one photo of the worst wall in each room

vendorPolicy.primaryBuyRateModel: preset package buy rates by standard size band

workflowActions.name: Create or update contact
workflowActions.notes: Map name, email, phone, propertyAddress, propertyType, notes, photo fields, source:squarespace, and lead:new from the website payload.

workflowActions.name: Create opportunity
workflowActions.notes: Place the opportunity in the Ready White Customer Jobs pipeline at the New Lead stage.

workflowActions.name: Request photos when missing
workflowActions.trigger: New Lead lacks required room/worst-wall/exception photos
workflowActions.notes: Move to Photos Requested and send the customer photo policy checklist.

workflowActions.name: Send instant SMS
workflowActions.message: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, thanks for contacting Ready White. We received your property request and are reviewing your photos now. We'll follow up shortly with next steps.

workflowActions.name: Send confirmation email
workflowActions.subject: Ready White received your property request
workflowActions.message: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, thanks for reaching out to Ready White. We’ve received your property refresh request and our team is reviewing the details now.

workflowActions.name: Send internal notification
workflowActions.notes: Notify the Ready White team with contact details, property address, property type, notes, timeline, vacancy status, and submitted photo file names or URLs.

futureEnhancements: AI estimator after operational logic is machine-readable
